logo_decision.reason: Single best candidate by clear margin: SVG of P_G_Logo_RGB in <header>, alt='Go to Procter & Gamble homepage', 6 paths real wordmark with the iconic blue P&G sphere monogram. No ambiguity to resolve.

palette_decision.reason: color_frequency #1 with 90 occurrences across 7/8 pages — vs #2 = 42 (only 1 page). Dominant chord is uncontested.

typography_decision.reason: computed_heading + freq #1 (count 67). Open-source Google Font, no licensing concern. No need to ask for fallback.
